title: Neptune MIDL Registry Schema
description: Unified schema for Neptune MIDL parser output and overlay JSON. Version 1.

name.description: Type name. null for anonymous struct/union.

primitive.description: For aliases: the target C type (uint32_t, int32_t, float, etc). For composites: struct, union, enum, interface. For constants: const. For top level functions: function.

fields.description: Fields for struct/union, values for enum

parent.description: Parent interface name (only for interface primitives)

value.description: For const types: the constant value

group.description: Function types: user assigned group ID. If missing, this function will not be accessible.

id.description: Function types: user assigned unique ID. If missing, this function will not be accessible.

name.description: Field name. null for anonymous struct/union.

type.description: Type name (string) or inline anonymous type (object)

index.description: Explicit index for overlay merge (auto-incremented if absent)

indirection.description: How many levels of pointer indirection

count.description: Element count for arrays/buffers: name of the count field (variable-length), literal count (fixed-length), or array of counts (multi-dimensional). For void/blob pointers, the count is in bytes (each element is one byte).

count_output.description: Only valid if output is true. Name of the field that receives the actual number of elements written.

condition.description: Expression for conditional marshal. false means always skip. 'self.' will be replaced by the variable name.

value.description: For enum fields: the enum value

idl_param_index.description: Index of corresponding IDL parameter (for auto-dispatch mapping)

index.description: Wire protocol method index. Auto-incremented if absent.

skip_default.description: When true, the generator emits only a forward declaration of the default thunk; the consumer must provide a hand-written body.

force_sync.description: When true, the guest proxy emits a synchronous npt_call_ thunk regardless of multi_ring_enabled. Use for methods whose HRESULT carries control-flow meaning (e.g. EnumOutputs returning DXGI_ERROR_NOT_FOUND) rather than fatal-error semantics.
